examples.title: Pseudocode: Bayes' Theorem
examples.description: Implementation of Bayes' Theorem for calculating posterior probability
examples.code:
FUNCTION BayesTheorem(prior, likelihood, evidence):
 posterior = (likelihood * prior) / evidence
 RETURN posterior
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to calculate the posterior probability using Bayes' Theorem.
